text: Nirob likes to speak conversational Bengali, English, and Hindi, with a strong preference for using Bengali most often.
The user's name is Nirav. He is comfortable communicating in Bengali, English, and Hindi, but prefers Bengali to be used more frequently.
The user likes the song "Ogo O Nodi Re Tui Bhangli Amar Ghar"
User prefers to be called Nirav, not "TECH".
